name: Handling unsupported file formats
prompt: Convert this file at ./data/archive.rar to markdown.
expected_behavior: Recognize RAR is not a supported format
Suggest extracting RAR first (unrar, 7z) then converting contents
success_criteria: Clearly communicates that the format is unsupported
Does not attempt conversion with wrong tool
edge_cases: RAR files require proprietary extraction tools → suggest alternatives (7z, unrar)
User may expect support → manage expectations clearly
